content_body: Our stay at Rustic Elegance was nothing short of amazing. The wrap around porches, mountain views, hot tub, games, large private yard, gas grill, easy check in, and kitchen stocked with all of the tools needed to cook greatly exceeded our expectations. Everything in the cabin from the appliances to cookware were good quality. We will definitely be using Cabin Rentals of Georgia for our next visit!
title: Best Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA
